MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KIM VU'S Motion To: A) Expunge Lis Pendens And Award Defendant Her Reasonable Attorneys Fees And B) Enter Judgment For Costs In Favor Of Defendant.

Grant. No opposition filed.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order for details)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order To Compel Joanna Pfeister To Arbitration And An Order To Stay Action Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-04-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joanna L. Pfeister (617-429-2355) Plaintiff/ opposing party in pro per.
No other appearances.

The court inquires of the plaintiff complied with the tentative ruling rule and finds there was no compliance. The Court explains the tentative ruling rule and crc 3.1312. Plaintiff requests for the proposed order to be e-mailed. Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KIM VU'S Motion For An Order To Compel Joanna Pfeister To Arbitration And An Order To Stay Action Pending Arbitration is GRANTED. This matter shall proceed to arbitration per the terms of the Purchase Agreement. This action shall be stayed. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b); plaintiff requests to have proposed order e-mailed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

Off Calendar Jun-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jonathan S. Ball (415-349-0721) of Ball Law Corporation for Plaintiff/Moving party JOANNA PFEISTER.
No other appearances.

Hearing is held. Moving Party states he has served to good and current address. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOANNA PFEISTER's attorney's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel is GRANTED. Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
